reviews.comment:

Excellent ACA Service Station. Ideal for a stop to refuel and have a drink at the well-stocked bar.

reviews.comment:
Lástima que abre la confitería a las 10,30hs y si con dimos no te corren la seviclub, el resto de 10.

It's a shame the confectionery shop opens at 10:30 am and if they don't rush you with the service club, the rest is a 10.

reviews.comment:
El lugar es genial. Esta a 1 km de la ruta. Hay poca gente cargando combustible. Tiene unos bancos con mesas para hacer un picnic, un kiosco de caramelos y baños limpios.

(Translated by Google)
The place is great. It's about 1 km from the highway. There are few people refueling. It has some benches with picnic tables, a candy stand, and clean restrooms.
